notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.17.3
New Feature: Gaia DR3 XP Spectral Library — 34.4 million pre-calibrated stellar spectra available as an offline installable database, accessible under the new Gaia menu. Install only the magnitude groups you need, from Ultra-Bright (220 MB) to Very Faint (73 GB). When installed, SFCC and NBExtract match stars against the local library instantly with no Gaia archive query required — real measured XP spectra are used directly for synthetic photometry instead of Pickles template approximations. Includes a built-in Spectrum Viewer to inspect any star's XP spectrum by name, coordinates, or Gaia source_id. Also added: histogram display in the Curves Editor, satellite trail detection improvements in Blink Comparator, a new System Log panel, and various stacking, display stretch, and UX fixes..
